mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(CAST(ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN occupancy_status = 'OCCUPIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS VARCHAR), '%') AS occupancyPercentage, CONCAT('$', CAST(COALESCE(SUM(rent_amount), 0) AS VARCHAR)) AS revenueSummary, SUM(CASE WHEN end_date <= DATEADD('DAY', 60, CURRENT_DATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expiringLeases, SUM(CASE WHEN occupancy_status = 'VACANT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacantUnits, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status NOT IN ('APPROVED', 'SIGNED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingApprovals FROM pm_lease
